'''''Syn's Shadow''''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]-sized [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] that belonged to the ruthless [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[Andov Syn]].

It was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] in a [[Turret/Legends|turret]].

Syn kept it equipped with at least eight [[Transponder code/Legends|transponder codes]] and its [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was interchangeable.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Syn's Shadow'' appears in the article ''[[Hunting the Hunters]]'' in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 6|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 6]].

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxyCite|6|Hunting the Hunters|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
